documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 2 implements the contract spine: @tesseract/contract wrapper types and structural guards, @tesseract/contract-runner-rego input helpers, @tesseract/contract-runner-llm-judge MVP panel defaults, and @tesseract/contract-style Layer-1 weasel scan. Adds vitest catalog entry, turbo test/typecheck pipelines, README Quickstarts, and updates the four feature task lists.

deferred_items.rationale: LLM-judge README contracts use TBD-on-commit content hashes and require the runner panel; deferred to the contract runner pass.
Handbook Zod schema validation is not implemented in this slice; structural guards only. Will be part of the contract-runner wiring slice.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the human gate at the phase boundary, and observes the no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule (only @tesseract/core dependencies).
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps governance and contract artifacts traceable while limiting scope to package boundaries declared in BOOTSTRAP.md step 2.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 contract spine package responsibilities and aligns with §4.5 wrapper schema for the structural guard layer.
